chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-1564 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A. 6186/2025 2. For orders on office objection 3. For orders on M.A. 6187/2025 4. For hearing of main case 02.09.2025 Mr. Muhammad Sajjad Soomro, Advocate for Petitioner. 1. Granted. 2to4. Counsel for the Petitioner submits that the Petitioner intends to avail remedy before learned Trial Court by filing appropriate application, as such, he does not press present Petition. Accordingly, this Petition is dismissed as withdrawn along with pending application. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
